results.question: What is the face amount of this policy?
results.evidence: Face Amount: $250,000
results.llm_answer: The face amount of this policy is $250,000. This is the death benefit payable to the beneficiary upon the insured’s death, as specified in the policy.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10. REINSTATEMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10.1 You may reinstate this policy within 3 years of lapse if:
     (a) You provide evidence of insurability satisfactory to us
     (b) You pay all overdue premiums with interest at 6% per annum
     (c) You repay or reinstate any policy loans with interest

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11. EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11.1 SUICIDE: If the insured dies by suicide within two years 
     from the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid, 
     without interest.

11.2 MISSTATEMENT OF AGE: If the insured's age was misstated, 
     we will adjust the face amount to what the premium would 
     have purchased at the correct age.

If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

results.question: If the policy owner stops paying premiums after three years and does not make a non-forfeiture election within 60 days, and the insured then dies, what death benefit amount will be paid?
results.expected_answer: Extended Term Insurance automatically applies, continuing the full face amount for a limited period based on the cash value; the full face amount would be payable if death occurs within that limited period.
results.evidence: 9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums. / 9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended Term Insurance will automatically apply.
results.llm_answer: The death benefit paid will be the full face amount, as Extended Term Insurance automatically applies and maintains the full face amount for a limited period based on the cash value.

results.question: Are dividends guaranteed to be declared each year?
results.expected_answer: No. Dividends are not guaranteed; they may be declared annually based on the company's mortality, investment, and expense experience.
results.evidence: 6.1 This is a participating policy. Annual dividends may be declared based on our mortality, investment, and expense experience. / 6.2 Dividends are not guaranteed.
results.llm_answer: Dividends are not guaranteed to be declared each year. They depend on the insurer’s financial performance and are declared annually by the Board of Directors.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1. INSURED INFORMATION
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Name: Margaret Rose Chen
DOB: July 8, 1978
Issue Age: 45
Risk Class: Standard Non-Tobacco

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2. COVERAGE SUMMARY
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Face Amount: $250,000
Annual Premium: $3,240
Payment Frequency: Annual
Premium Payment Period: To age 100
Maturity Date: Age 100 (July 8, 2078)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
3. BENEFICIARIES
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Primary: David Chen (Husband) - 100%
Contingent: Chen Family Trust - 100%

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
4. KEY DEFINITIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
"Cash Surrender Value" - The amount available if the policy is 
surrendered, equal to the cash value minus any outstanding loans 
and surrender charges.

"Dividend" - A return of premium that may be declared annually 
by the Board of Directors based on company experience.

"Paid-Up Insurance" - A reduced death benefit with no further 
premiums required.

"Policy Loan" - A loan made by us using the cash value as collateral.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
5. CASH VALUE ACCUMULATION
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
5.1 This policy builds cash value according to the guaranteed 
    schedule shown in the policy values table.

5.2 Cash value grows on a tax-deferred basis.

5.3 Guaranteed cash value at end of Year 10: $28,450

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7. POLICY LOANS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7.1 You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has 
    been in force for one full year.

7.2 Maximum loan amount: 90% of current cash surrender value.

7.3 Loan interest rate: 5% per annum, compounded annually.

7.4 Interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance.

7.5 If total indebtedness exceeds the cash value, the policy 
    will terminate unless sufficient payment is made within 
    31 days of notice.

7.6 Outstanding loans and accrued interest will be deducted 
    from the death benefit or cash surrender value.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8. DEATH BENEFIT PAYMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8.1 Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary:
    Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest

8.2 Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete 
    claim documentation.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10. REINSTATEMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10.1 You may reinstate this policy within 3 years of lapse if:
     (a) You provide evidence of insurability satisfactory to us
     (b) You pay all overdue premiums with interest at 6% per annum
     (c) You repay or reinstate any policy loans with interest

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11. EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11.1 SUICIDE: If the insured dies by suicide within two years 
     from the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid, 
     without interest.

11.2 MISSTATEMENT OF AGE: If the insured's age was misstated, 
     we will adjust the face amount to what the premium would 
     have purchased at the correct age.

"Cash Surrender Value" - The amount available if the policy is

"Dividend" - A return of premium that may be declared annually 
by the Board of Directors based on company experience.

"Paid-Up Insurance" - A reduced death benefit with no further 
premiums required.

"Policy Loan" - A loan made by us using the cash value as collateral.

1. INSURED INFORMATION
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Name: Margaret Rose Chen
DOB: July 8, 1978
Issue Age: 45
Risk Class: Standard Non-Tobacco

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2. COVERAGE SUMMARY
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Face Amount: $250,000
Annual Premium: $3,240
Payment Frequency: Annual
Premium Payment Period: To age 100
Maturity Date: Age 100 (July 8, 2078)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
3. BENEFICIARIES
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Primary: David Chen (Husband) - 100%
Contingent: Chen Family Trust - 100%

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
4. KEY DEFINITIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
"Cash Surrender Value" - The amount available if the policy is 
surrendered, equal to the cash value minus any outstanding loans 
and surrender charges.

"Dividend" - A return of premium that may be declared annually 
by the Board of Directors based on company experience.

"Paid-Up Insurance" - A reduced death benefit with no further 
premiums required.

"Policy Loan" - A loan made by us using the cash value as collateral.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
5. CASH VALUE ACCUMULATION
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
5.1 This policy builds cash value according to the guaranteed 
    schedule shown in the policy values table.

5.2 Cash value grows on a tax-deferred basis.

5.3 Guaranteed cash value at end of Year 10: $28,450
    Guaranteed cash value at end of Year 20: $71,200

5.4 Actual cash value may be higher due to dividend credits.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
6. POLICY DIVIDENDS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
6.1 This is a participating policy. Annual dividends may be 
    declared based on our mortality, investment, and expense 
    experience.

6.2 Dividends are not guaranteed.

6.3 DIVIDEND OPTIONS (select one):
    ✓ Cash Payment - Dividend paid directly to you
    □ Premium Reduction - Applied to reduce next premium
    □ Accumulate at Interest - Left with us to accumulate
    □ Paid-Up Additions - Purchase additional insurance
    [Current selection: Paid-Up Additions]

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7. POLICY LOANS
2,	reduce next premium
    □ Accumulate at Interest - Left with us to accumulate
    □ Paid-Up Additions - Purchase additional insurance
    [Current selection: Paid-Up Additions]

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

7.1 You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has

    31 days of notice.

    from the death benefit or cash surrender value.

8.1 Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary:
    Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest

8.2 Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete 
    claim documentation.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

7. POLICY LOANS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7.1 You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has 
    been in force for one full year.

7.2 Maximum loan amount: 90% of current cash surrender value.

7.3 Loan interest rate: 5% per annum, compounded annually.

7.4 Interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance.

7.5 If total indebtedness exceeds the cash value, the policy 
    will terminate unless sufficient payment is made within 
    31 days of notice.

7.6 Outstanding loans and accrued interest will be deducted 
    from the death benefit or cash surrender value.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8. DEATH BENEFIT PAYMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8.1 Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary:
    Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest

8.2 Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete 
    claim documentation.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10. REINSTATEMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10.1 You may reinstate this policy within 3 years of lapse if:
     (a) You provide evidence of insurability satisfactory to us
     (b) You pay all overdue premiums with interest at 6% per annum
     (c) You repay or reinstate any policy loans with interest

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11. EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS
────────

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7. POLICY LOANS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7.1 You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has 
    been in force for one full year.

7.2 Maximum loan amount: 90% of current cash surrender value.

7.3 Loan interest rate: 5% per annum, compounded annually.

7.4 Interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance.

7.5 If total indebtedness exceeds the cash value, the policy 
    will terminate unless sufficient payment is made within 
    31 days of notice.

7.6 Outstanding loans and accrued interest will be deducted 
    from the death benefit or cash surrender value.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8. DEATH BENEFIT PAYMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8.1 Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary:
    Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest

8.2 Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete 
    claim documentation.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10. REINSTATEMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10.1 You may reinstate this policy within 3 years of lapse if:
     (a) You provide evidence of insurability satisfactory to us
     (b) You pay all overdue premiums with interest at 6% per annum
     (c) You repay or reinstate any policy loans with interest

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11. EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11.1 SUICIDE: If the insured dies by suicide within two years 
     from the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid, 
     without interest.

11.2 MISSTATEMENT OF AGE: If the insured's age was misstated, 
     we will adjust the face amount to what the premium would 
     have purchased at the correct age.

7. POLICY LOANS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7.1 You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has 
    been in force for one full year.

7.2 Maximum loan amount: 90% of current cash surrender value.

7.3 Loan interest rate: 5% per annum, compounded annually.

7.4 Interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance.

7.5 If total indebtedness exceeds the cash value, the policy 
    will terminate unless sufficient payment is made within 
    31 days of notice.

7.6 Outstanding loans and accrued interest will be deducted 
    from the death benefit or cash surrender value.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8. DEATH BENEFIT PAYMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8.1 Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary:
    Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest

8.2 Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete 
    claim documentation.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7. POLICY LOANS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7.1 You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has 
    been in force for one full year.

7.2 Maximum loan amount: 90% of current cash surrender value.

7.3 Loan interest rate: 5% per annum, compounded annually.

7.4 Interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance.

7.5 If total indebtedness exceeds the cash value, the policy 
    will terminate unless sufficient payment is made within 
    31 days of notice.

7.6 Outstanding loans and accrued interest will be deducted 
    from the death benefit or cash surrender value.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8. DEATH BENEFIT PAYMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8.1 Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary:
    Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest

8.2 Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete 
    claim documentation.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10. REINSTATEMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10.1 You may reinstate this policy within 3 years of lapse if:
     (a) You provide evidence of insurability satisfactory to us
     (b) You pay all overdue premiums with interest at 6% per annum
     (c) You repay or reinstate any policy loans with interest

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11. EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11.1 SUICIDE: If the insured dies by suicide within two years 
     from the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid, 
     without interest.

11.2 MISSTATEMENT OF AGE: If the insured's age was misstated, 
     we will adjust the face amount to what the premium would 
     have purchased at the correct age.

results.fact: The suicide exclusion period is two years from the issue date.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7. POLICY LOANS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7.1 You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has 
    been in force for one full year.

7.2 Maximum loan amount: 90% of current cash surrender value.

7.3 Loan interest rate: 5% per annum, compounded annually.

7.4 Interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance.

7.5 If total indebtedness exceeds the cash value, the policy 
    will terminate unless sufficient payment is made within 
    31 days of notice.

7.6 Outstanding loans and accrued interest will be deducted 
    from the death benefit or cash surrender value.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8. DEATH BENEFIT PAYMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8.1 Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary:
    Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest

8.2 Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete 
    claim documentation.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10. REINSTATEMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10.1 You may reinstate this policy

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7. POLICY LOANS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
7.1 You may borrow against the cash value after the policy has 
    been in force for one full year.

7.2 Maximum loan amount: 90% of current cash surrender value.

7.3 Loan interest rate: 5% per annum, compounded annually.

7.4 Interest may be paid annually or added to the loan balance.

7.5 If total indebtedness exceeds the cash value, the policy 
    will terminate unless sufficient payment is made within 
    31 days of notice.

7.6 Outstanding loans and accrued interest will be deducted 
    from the death benefit or cash surrender value.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8. DEATH BENEFIT PAYMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8.1 Upon receipt of proof of death, we will pay the beneficiary:
    Face Amount + Paid-Up Additions - Policy Loans - Loan Interest

8.2 Payment will be made within 7 days of receiving complete 
    claim documentation.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9. NON-FORFEITURE OPTIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
If you stop paying premiums after the policy has been in force for 
three years, you may elect:

9.1 CASH SURRENDER: Receive the cash surrender value and 
    terminate the policy.

9.2 REDUCED PAID-UP INSURANCE: Continue coverage for a reduced 
    death benefit with no further premiums required. Amount 
    based on cash value and insured's attained age.

9.3 EXTENDED TERM INSURANCE: Continue the full face amount for 
    a limited period based on cash value. No further premiums.

9.4 If no election is made within 60 days of lapse, Extended 
    Term Insurance will automatically apply.

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10. REINSTATEMENT
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
10.1 You may reinstate this policy within 3 years of lapse if:
     (a) You provide evidence of insurability satisfactory to us
     (b) You pay all overdue premiums with interest at 6% per annum
     (c) You repay or reinstate any policy loans with interest

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11. EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11.1 SUICIDE: If the insured dies by suicide within two years 
     from the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid, 
     without interest.

11.2 MISSTATEMENT OF AGE: If the insured's age was misstated, 
     we will adjust the face amount to what the premium would 
     have purchased at the correct age.
